policy_yaml:
version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule package-scripts-only:
    block exec "tsc" if AGENT
    block exec "vitest" if AGENT
    block exec "eslint" if AGENT
    block exec "prettier" if AGENT
    block exec "npx" if AGENT
    because "Use package.json scripts through npm run instead of direct tool commands."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule npm-build-for-tsc:
    block exec "tsc" if AGENT
    block exec "vite" if AGENT
    because "Use npm run build to run tsc and the test build."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule npm-test-before-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "src/**" or write "tests/**"
    because "Run npm run test after source or test changes before committing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule single-test-via-npm:
    block exec "vitest" if AGENT
    block exec "jest" if AGENT
    because "Run a single test through npm run test path-to-test.ts."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule npm-format-only:
    block exec "prettier" if AGENT
    block exec "eslint" if AGENT
    because "Use npm run format for formatting and lint feedback."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule slash-command-files:
    notify write file "hermes_cli/commands.py" if AGENT
    notify write file "hermes_cli/cli.py" if AGENT
    notify write file "gateway/run.py" if AGENT
    because "Slash command work needs the registry entry, CLI handler, optional gateway handler, and save_config_value for persistent settings."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule config-defaults:
    notify write file "hermes_cli/config.py" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "python" since write "hermes_cli/config.py"
    because "Config changes must update DEFAULT_CONFIG and only bump _config_version for real migrations."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule venv-before-python:
    notify exec "python" if AGENT
    notify exec "pip" if AGENT
    notify exec "pytest" if AGENT
    because "Prefer .venv, then venv, before Python commands; scripts/run_tests.sh probes the supported venvs."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule skill-description-check:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "python" since write "skills/**/SKILL.md"
    because "Verify skill descriptions are one sentence, at most 60 characters, and avoid marketing words before committing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule skill-assets-layout:
    notify write file "skills/**/SKILL.md" if AGENT
    notify write file "skills/**" if AGENT
    because "Skill helper assets should live in scripts, references, or templates and be referenced from SKILL.md."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule profile-safe-code:
    notify write file "hermes_cli/**" if AGENT
    block write file "/home/*/.hermes/**" if AGENT
    block write file "/root/.hermes/**" if AGENT
    because "Use get_hermes_home for state paths, display_hermes_home for messages, and token locks for gateway credentials."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-hardcoded-hermes-home:
    block write file "/home/*/.hermes/**" if AGENT
    block write file "/root/.hermes/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "hermes_cli/**" if AGENT
    because "Do not hardcode ~/.hermes; use get_hermes_home and display_hermes_home so profiles work."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-simple-term-menu:
    notify write file "**/*.py" if AGENT
    because "New interactive menus must use hermes_cli/curses_ui.py, not new simple_term_menu call sites."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule stale-squash-merge:
    notify exec "git" "merge" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "diff" if AGENT
    because "Before squash merging, update with origin main and verify the final diff for unexpected deletions."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule dead-code-e2e-first:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "run_tests.sh" since write "**/*.py"
    because "Before wiring unused code into a live path, E2E test the real import and resolution chain against a temp HERMES_HOME."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule tests-no-real-hermes-home:
    block write file "/home/*/.hermes/**" if AGENT
    block write file "/root/.hermes/**" if AGENT
    because "Tests must not write to real ~/.hermes; use the isolated HERMES_HOME/profile fixture pattern."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule pytest-wrapper-only:
    block exec "pytest" if AGENT
    block exec "python" "pytest" if AGENT
    because "Use scripts/run_tests.sh instead of direct pytest for CI-parity isolation and environment scrubbing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule direct-pytest-minimums:
    notify exec "pytest" if AGENT
    notify exec "python" "pytest" if AGENT
    block exec "git" "push" if AGENT unless after exec "run_tests.sh" since write "tests/**"
    because "If direct pytest is unavoidable, activate the venv and still run the full wrapper suite before pushing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule agent-workspace-only:
    block write file "**" if AGENT unless target "agent-workspace/**"
    because "Harness agents may edit only agent-workspace, including agent_helpers.py and domain-skills."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule go-build-commands:
    notify exec "go" "build" if AGENT
    notify exec "go" "run" if AGENT
    because "Use go build . or go run . for build verification."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule go-test-commands:
    notify exec "task" "test" if AGENT
    notify exec "go" "test" if AGENT
    because "Use task test or go test ./... for tests, with -run for a single Go test."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule golden-update-via-go:
    block write file "*.golden" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "go"
    notify exec "go" "-update" if AGENT
    because "Regenerate golden files through go test -update, optionally scoped to the package."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule lint-task:
    block exec "golangci-lint" if AGENT
    notify exec "task" "lint:fix" if AGENT
    because "Use task lint:fix for lint fixes."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule format-task:
    notify exec "task" "fmt" if AGENT
    notify exec "gofumpt" if AGENT
    because "Use task fmt or gofumpt -w . for formatting."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule modernize-task:
    notify exec "task" "modernize" if AGENT
    because "Use task modernize for code simplification passes."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule dev-task:
    notify exec "task" "dev" if AGENT
    because "Use task dev for profiling-enabled development runs."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule format-go-before-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "gofumpt" since write "*.go"
    because "Format Go code with gofumpt first, falling back to goimports or gofmt only if needed."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source UI_GUIDE = file "internal/ui/AGENTS.md"
  
  rule read-ui-guide:
    block write file "internal/ui/**" if AGENT and not UI_GUIDE
    because "Read internal/ui/AGENTS.md before working on the TUI."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SECRET = file "**/.env"
  source SECRET = file ".env"
  
  rule no-public-secrets:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT and SECRET
    notify write file "CLAUDE.md" if AGENT
    because "Do not add API keys, credentials, private URLs, or internal details to the public repo guidance."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule reload-before-mcp-test:
    notify exec "npm" "test" if AGENT
    notify exec "node" if AGENT
    because "After MCP server changes, ask the user to reload the server before testing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule build-before-testing:
    block exec "npm" "test" if AGENT unless after exec "tsc" since write "src/**" or write "package.json"
    because "Run npm run build before testing changes."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule dev-after-package-update:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "npm" since write "package.json" or write "package-lock.json"
    because "After package updates, run npm run dev to rebuild the database before committing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule coverage-script:
    notify exec "npm" "run" if AGENT
    because "Use npm run test:coverage when checking coverage."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule node-essentials:
    notify write file "**/*.ts" if AGENT
    because "Prefer get_node_essentials over get_node_info for faster responses."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule subagents-no-git-publish:
    kill exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "Sub-agents must not commit or push; the primary agent handles publishing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule typecheck-and-lint:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "tsc" since write "src/**"
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "eslint" since write "src/**"
    because "Run typecheck and lint after every code change before committing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule avoid-new-files:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT
    because "Create files only when they are absolutely necessary for the goal."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule prefer-existing-files:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT
    because "Prefer editing an existing file over creating a new one."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-proactive-docs:
    block write file "README.md" if AGENT
    block write file "**/README.md" if AGENT
    notify write file "*.md" if AGENT
    because "Do not proactively create documentation or README files unless the user explicitly asks."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule global-styles-location:
    block write file "*.css" if AGENT unless target "src/renderer/styles/**"
    block write file "*.scss" if AGENT unless target "src/renderer/styles/**"
    because "Global styles belong only in src/renderer/styles."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule vitest-before-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "vitest" since write "src/**" or write "tests/**"
    because "Run bun run test with Vitest before every commit and keep coverage at the target."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule dev-code-quality:
    notify write file "src/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "*.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "*.tsx" if AGENT
    because "During development, run bun run lint:fix, bun run format, and bunx tsc --noEmit as you edit."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule prek-before-pr:
    block exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT unless after exec "prek" since write "**"
    block exec "git" "push" if AGENT unless after exec "prek" since write "**"
    because "Before every PR, run prek from origin/main to HEAD and fix issues before pushing or opening the PR."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule i18n-validation:
    block exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT unless after exec "bun" since write "src/renderer/**" or write "locales/**" or write "src/common/config/i18n/**"
    block exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT unless after exec "node" since write "src/renderer/**" or write "locales/**" or write "src/common/config/i18n/**"
    because "If renderer, locale, or i18n config files changed, run bun run i18n:types and node scripts/check-i18n.js before opening a PR."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule initial-setup-script:
    notify exec "setup.sh" if AGENT
    because "Run scripts/setup.sh to initialize submodules and build GhosttyKit."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule cmuxd-releasefast:
    notify exec "zig" "build" if AGENT
    because "When rebuilding cmuxd for release or bundling, use zig build with -Doptimize=ReleaseFast."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule cleanup-old-tags:
    notify exec "reload.sh" if AGENT
    notify exec "open" if AGENT
    because "Before launching a new tagged run, quit old tagged apps and remove their sockets and derived data."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule reload-tag-local-dev:
    kill exec "xcodebuild" if AGENT
    kill exec "open" if AGENT
    notify exec "reload.sh" if AGENT
    because "After code changes, build the Debug app with scripts/reload.sh --tag rather than bare xcodebuild or open."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule cloud-vm-backend-boundary:
    block write file "**/rivet/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "web/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "packages/**" if AGENT
    because "Cloud VM backend logic must stay in Vercel route handlers and Effect services backed by Postgres."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule regression-two-commit:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    notify write file "cmuxTests/**" if AGENT
    because "Regression tests for bug fixes should use a failing-test commit followed by the fix commit so CI proves the test."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule reload-app-path-link:
    notify exec "reload.sh" if AGENT
    because "Use the App path line from reload.sh output to build the cmd-clickable file URL; do not hardcode the path."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule shared-behavior-path:
    notify write file "*.swift" if AGENT
    notify write file "web/**" if AGENT
    because "Implement shared behavior through one action or model path across shortcuts, menus, CLI, settings, and debug surfaces."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule bug-repro-coverage:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "xcodebuild" since write "cmuxTests/**"
    notify write file "cmuxTests/**" if AGENT
    because "When tests missed a bug, add behavior-level coverage for the exact repro before calling the fix complete."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-displaylink-loop:
    notify write file "*.swift" if AGENT
    because "Do not add app-level display links or manual ghostty_surface_draw loops; rely on Ghostty wakeups and renderer."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-tmp-app-links:
    block write file "/tmp/cmux-*/**" if AGENT
    notify exec "reload.sh" if AGENT
    because "Never use /tmp/cmux-tag app links in chat output; use the reload.sh App path output."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule submodule-push-before-parent:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "Push submodule commits to the remote main branch before committing the updated parent pointer."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule shortcut-policy:
    notify write file "KeyboardShortcutSettings" if AGENT
    notify write file "cmux.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "docs/**" if AGENT
    because "New cmux-owned shortcuts must be in settings, persisted in cmux.json, and documented."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule tagged-debug-helper:
    kill exec "cmux-cli" if AGENT
    notify exec "cmux-debug-cli.sh" if AGENT
    because "For tagged Debug dogfood, set CMUX_TAG and use scripts/cmux-debug-cli.sh instead of /tmp/cmux-cli."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule pbxproj-test-wiring:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "lint-pbxproj-test-wiring.sh" since write "cmuxTests/**"
    because "Wire new cmuxTests Swift files into the Xcode project and run the pbxproj test wiring lint before committing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-bare-xcodebuild-open:
    kill exec "xcodebuild" if AGENT
    kill exec "open" if AGENT
    notify exec "reload.sh" if AGENT
    because "After code changes, use reload.sh --tag; never run bare xcodebuild or open an untagged cmux DEV app."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule socket-no-focus-steal:
    block exec "open" if AGENT
    notify exec "cmux-debug-cli.sh" if AGENT
    because "Socket and CLI commands must not activate the app, raise windows, or steal focus."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule focus-intent-only:
    notify exec "cmux-debug-cli.sh" "send" if AGENT
    because "Only explicit focus-intent commands may mutate in-app focus or selection."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-local-tests:
    kill exec "xcodebuild" "test" if AGENT
    kill exec "pytest" if AGENT
    kill exec "python" "pytest" if AGENT
    kill exec "swift" "test" if AGENT
    because "Do not run tests locally; use GitHub Actions or the VM for E2E, UI, and socket tests."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule e2e-via-gh-workflow:
    kill exec "xcodebuild" "test" if AGENT
    kill exec "pytest" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" "workflow" if AGENT
    because "Trigger E2E and UI tests with gh workflow run test-e2e.yml."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule unit-test-ci-preferred:
    notify exec "xcodebuild" "cmux-unit" if AGENT
    because "The cmux-unit xcodebuild scheme is safe because it does not launch the app, but CI is preferred."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule python-socket-tagged-only:
    kill exec "open" if AGENT
    notify exec "python" "pytest" if AGENT
    because "For python socket tests, never launch an untagged app; use a tagged socket via CMUX_SOCKET_PATH."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule tagged-derived-data-build:
    notify exec "xcodebuild" "build" if AGENT
    because "For compile-only verification, use xcodebuild with a tagged derivedDataPath under /tmp/cmux-tag."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule never-open-untagged:
    kill exec "open" if AGENT
    because "Never open an untagged cmux DEV app from DerivedData."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule ghostty-submodule-workflow:
    notify write file "ghostty/**" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    because "Ghostty changes must be committed in the submodule, pushed to the manaflow fork, documented, then the parent pointer updated."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule release-command-flow:
    notify exec "git" "tag" if AGENT
    notify exec "bump-version.sh" if AGENT
    because "Use the release command to bump version, update changelog, run guards, tag, and push."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule pretag-guard-before-tag:
    block exec "git" "tag" if AGENT unless after exec "release-pretag-guard.sh" since write "**"
    because "Run scripts/release-pretag-guard.sh before creating a release tag, and bump version if the guard fails."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule manual-release-guard:
    block exec "git" "tag" if AGENT unless after exec "release-pretag-guard.sh" since write "**"
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT
    notify exec "gh" "watch" if AGENT
    because "Manual release must run the pretag guard, tag, push, and watch the GitHub run."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule ghosttykit-releasefast:
    block write file "GhosttyKit.xcframework/**" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "zig"
    notify exec "zig" "build" if AGENT
    because "When rebuilding GhosttyKit.xcframework, use zig build with ReleaseFast optimization."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule minor-version-bump:
    notify exec "bump-version.sh" if AGENT
    notify write file "package.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "Info.plist" if AGENT
    because "For updates, bump the minor version unless explicitly asked otherwise."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule changelog-update:
    notify write file "CHANGELOG.md" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "Update CHANGELOG.md because the docs changelog renders from it."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule rust-quality-gate:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "rustfmt" since write "*.rs"
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "clippy-driver" since write "*.rs"
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "cargo" since write "*.rs"
    because "After Rust edits, run cargo fmt --all, cargo clippy --all-targets, and cargo test --all before committing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-commit-without-checks:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "cargo" since write "*.rs"
    because "Never commit code until the required checks have passed."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule clippy-zero-tolerance:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "clippy-driver" since write "*.rs"
    because "Fix all clippy warnings before moving on."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule fix-build-failures:
    notify exec "cargo" "build" if AGENT
    because "If the build fails, fix it immediately before continuing to the next task."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule filter-performance-check:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "hyperfine" since write "src/**"
    because "For filter changes, run the before and after hyperfine checks and confirm target/release/rtk stays under the threshold."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule confirm-working-directory:
    notify exec "pwd" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "branch" if AGENT
    because "Confirm the working directory and intended branch before starting work."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule prefer-rtk-wrapper:
    notify exec "git" if AGENT
    notify exec "cargo" if AGENT
    because "If rtk is installed, prefer rtk subcommands over raw commands for token-optimized output."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule rust-quality-gate:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "rustfmt" since write "*.rs"
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "clippy-driver" since write "*.rs"
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "cargo" since write "*.rs"
    because "After Rust edits, run cargo fmt --all, cargo clippy --all-targets, and cargo test --all before committing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule python-precommit-checklist:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "ruff" since write "src/**" or write "tests/**"
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "pytest" since write "src/**" or write "tests/**"
    because "Before committing, run ruff check, ruff format --check, and pytest tests -v -x."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SECRETS = file ".env"
  source SECRETS = file "**/.env"
  
  rule no-api-key-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT and SECRETS
    because "Never commit API keys; use the named environment variables instead."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SECRETS = file ".env"
  source SECRETS = file "**/.env"
  
  rule api-keys-env-or-envfile:
    block exec "git" "commit" if AGENT and SECRETS
    notify write file ".env" if AGENT
    because "Keep API keys in environment variables or ignored .env files, not versioned content."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule editable-install-before-tests:
    block exec "pytest" if AGENT unless after exec "pip" since write "pyproject.toml" or write "setup.py"
    block exec "python" "pytest" if AGENT unless after exec "pip" since write "pyproject.toml" or write "setup.py"
    because "Install the package in editable mode before running tests so skill_seekers is importable."
